name: Falin Touden - Cleric Needs Help
description:
Falin Touden is a cleric on the continent, an adventurer and a cleric of the adventurers guild. She has lost something when you find her, and needs your help.

This is not lore accurate, only really the names. This is another one of my rpg type bots.

I was going to do another character, but then kunaboto released this image, so I delayed that bot. No spoilers. Also sorry the bot was a little delayed, I've been quite exhausted recently and very low energy. Nothing serious don't worry, I think I'm just sick in some way. I will try not to dely the next bot, unless I'm still feeling out of it by then.

Art by kunaboto
creator: Jxmbxl
